title: LifeSmart DEFED Smart Station Pro (CoSS+Zigbee+WiFi) support Matter LS205WH
description:
Smart station is the control center of the DEFED alarm system. It collects, processes, and reports every signal and information of the system. It supports tamper protection, PoE power supply, backup battery power supply, LED status display, etc.
Certificate: CE | Adapter: CN/UK/US/EU/JP/AU, or PoE, or battery | Packaging: English | EAN: 6932046203425 | HS code: 8517623990 | Package size: 17.7*9.8*17.8 | Weight: 0.561 kg | Notes: supported Homekit
